description: Body-editor IPC calls bypass the feedReducer→adapter command bus pattern. FeedRow.svelte directly imports invoke from @tauri-apps/api/core (line 36) and makes three direct IPC calls: editor_update_note_body (line 166), trigger_idle_save (line 172), and trigger_blur_save (line 183). All other feed operations (select-past-note, request-note-deletion, confirm-note-deletion, add-tag-via-chip, remove-tag-via-chip, filter operations) flow through the feedReducer emission → FeedList dispatchCommand → TauriFeedAdapter pattern. The body-editor IPC creates a parallel effect path that is not governed by the reducer's state machine, making the effectful shell harder to audit and test.

secondaryEvidence.description: Adapter CMD const has no entries for body-editor IPC commands
feedReducer has no action variants or command outputs for inline body editing operations
